It:\n- Sets strict mode.\n- Registers `ts-node` to enable on-the-fly TypeScript compilation.\n- Loads a local `cli` module.\n- Contains a source map comment.\n\n---\n\n### Confirming if issues are present:\n\n- **Are there any vulnerabilities or malicious behaviors?**  \n  No. The code is standard for a TypeScript CLI bootstrap.
